# Modeling Worksheets

Copy these tables into a case report or spreadsheet.

## Case boundary

| Field | Entry |
|---|---|
| Public need | |
| Beneficiary population | |
| Place/system boundary | |
| Time step and horizon | |
| Included processes | |
| Explicit exclusions | |
| Decision owner | |

## Stakeholder registry

| ID | Name | Role | Mission | Hard constraints | Decisions | Data available |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | User/source/regulator/operator | | | | |

## VOMR accounts

| Stakeholder | Account | Symbol | Unit | Opening value | Update event | Update equation |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|---|
| | Value | | | | | |
| | Output | | | | | |
| | Mission | | | | | |
| | Resources | | | | | |

## PSKVE exchanges

| Source | Destination | Product | Service | Knowledge | Values | Environment | Trigger |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | | | | | |

## MIG specification

| Stakeholder | MIG meaning | Time unit | Zero | One | Inputs | Hard limits | Reasoning mode |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | | | | | |

## Setup specification

| Architecture | Setup operator | Negotiated before run | May adapt during run | Authority and consent | Objective |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Baseline | Independent | N/A | No | Stakeholder | Local |
| SOTA | Smart contract | Yes | No | Contract parties | |
| TISE | Adaptive PUDAL | Initial policy | Yes | Cooperative governance | |

## Scenario definition

| Scenario | Onset | Severity | Duration | Affected resources/exchanges | Recovery condition |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| Normal | | 0 | | | |
| | | | | | |

## Experiment matrix

| Architecture | Reasoner | Scenario | Objective | Seed | Repetitions | Output file |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| | | | | | | |

## Traceability

| Public need | Mission | MIG | PSKVE exchange | VOMR update | Metric | Python object | Test |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | | | | | |
